canon.name: C4 decision_log has iterate ADR
canon.remediation: Add an ADR to .shipwright/agent_docs/decision_log.md via write_decision_log.py

canon.name: C5 CHANGELOG [Unreleased] has Added entry
canon.remediation: Prepend an Unreleased bullet via append_changelog_entry.py

workflow.name: W3 F5a/F5b work_completed + test-evidence
workflow.remediation: Call record_event --type work_completed --source iterate and regenerate .shipwright/compliance/test-evidence.md via update_compliance.py.
